MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Granting Plaintiff Leave To Proceed With Her Appeal, Etc.; Medorandum Of Points And Authorities To Use Settled Statement Instead Of A Reporters Transcript
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CRISTA MILLER's Motion For An Order Granting Plaintiff Leave To Proceed With Her Appeal; To Use Settled Statement Instead Of A Reporters Transcript.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "motion to use settled statement instead of a reporter's transcript" is denied without prejudice. Counsel are ordered to meet and confer re their proposed separate statements.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2022 Continued To Oct-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NIKOLAUS W. REED, Esq. of Law Office of Nikolaus W. Eed (Tel: 415-940-7766) for plaintiff;
Atty. MARK J. HANCOCK, Esq. of Gough & Hancock LLP (Tel: 415-848-8916) for defendant Pacigic Gas and Electric Company;
Atty. FEDERICO A. STEA, Esq. of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP (Tel: 415-278-9400) for defendant/cross-defendant Hip Sen Benevolent Association.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
